title: 阿尔诺芬妮夫妇像
sourceReference: Jan van Eyck, The Arnolfini Portrait, 1434; public-domain composition reference
assetPolicy: GPT-generated paper-collage reinterpretation; no pixels copied from the linked page
masterPromptSummary: A recognizable hand-cut paper-collage reinterpretation preserving the left man in dark robes, right woman in an emerald gown, joined hands, convex mirror, chandelier, red bed and small dog.

background.processing: built-in precise object removal followed by registered 1200x2000 normalization

layers.processing: registered 2x-antialiased alpha masks; full-canvas lossless WebP

relief.processing: registered master color plus deterministic luminance depth with semantic layer boosts
